reasons.detail: Ron's table has 0 rows for this client_id across all months. All waterfall apps are incremental — they were previously untracked.

1 apps matched via Google Click ID (GCLID) in Google Ads click_view API. These have full keyword-level attribution — we know the exact search term, ad group, and campaign. This is the highest-fidelity attribution tier.

19 apps attributed via campaign_id extracted from URL parameters (gad_campaignid) or attribution string patterns. Campaign-level attribution without keyword detail. Campaigns: Unknown Campaign, Unknown Campaign.

2 apps identified as Google Ads via category='Paid' + subcategory='Google Ads' but no campaign_id could be extracted. These are in the 'Other Google Ads' bucket. The attribution string may lack a gad_campaignid param or use an unrecognized format.

Top 3 of 3 campaigns:
  Unknown Campaign: 18 apps (T1=0, T2=18, T3=0)
  KCU - Personal - Brand: 1 apps (T1=1, T2=0, T3=0)
  Unknown Campaign: 1 apps (T1=0, T2=1, T3=0)

discrepancy.explanation: Ron's staging.google_ads_campaign_data has NO rows for client_id='kitsap_cu'. This client has not been onboarded into Ron's pipeline yet. Our waterfall is the only source of Google Ads attribution.

recommendations.title: Ron's pipeline has no data for this client
recommendations.impact: All 22 waterfall apps are incremental — previously untracked
recommendations.action: No discrepancy to investigate. Our waterfall is the first pipeline to attribute Google Ads for this client. Ron's staging.google_ads_campaign_data table has 0 rows for this client_id. This means we are providing attribution data that did not exist before.

recommendations.title: 1 apps with full keyword-level attribution (T1)
recommendations.impact: GCLID matched in Google Ads click_view API — highest fidelity
recommendations.action: These 1 apps have complete attribution: search term, ad group, campaign, match type, and keyword. This data comes from matching the GCLID (Google Click ID) captured in the application URL against Google's click_view report.

recommendations.title: 19 apps with campaign-level attribution (T2)
recommendations.impact: Campaign ID extracted from URL params or attribution string
recommendations.action: These 19 apps have campaign_id attribution from either: (a) gad_campaignid URL parameter, (b) campaign ID embedded in the attribution string pattern, or (c) gbraid/wbraid iOS privacy-safe click identifiers. Campaign-level KPIs (apps, approved, funded, LTV) are reliable.

recommendations.title: 2 apps still in T3 (9.1%)
recommendations.action: Investigate T3 attribution strings for extractable campaign IDs

recommendations.title: Attribution rate: 90.9%
recommendations.action: Review T3 attribution strings for campaign ID patterns
